name: kodik
description: Official Kodik plugins marketplace — curated by the Kodik team.

plugins.name: discord
plugins.description: Discord channel for your AI assistant — messaging bridge with built-in access control. Manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /discord:access.

plugins.name: imessage
plugins.description: iMessage channel for your AI assistant — reads chat.db directly, sends via AppleScript. Built-in access control; manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /imessage:access.

plugins.name: telegram
plugins.description: Telegram channel for your AI assistant — messaging bridge with built-in access control. Manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /telegram:access.

plugins.name: agent-sdk-dev
plugins.description: your AI assistant Agent SDK Development Plugin

plugins.name: code-setup
plugins.description: Analyze codebases and recommend tailored your AI assistant automations such as hooks, skills, MCP servers, and subagents.

plugins.name: md-management
plugins.description: Tools to maintain and improve CLAUDE.md files - audit quality, capture session learnings, and keep project memory current.

plugins.name: code-modernization
plugins.description: Modernize legacy codebases (COBOL, legacy Java/C++, monolith web apps) with a structured assess → map → extract-rules → brief → reimagine/transform → harden workflow and specialist review agents

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Automated code review for pull requests using multiple specialized agents with confidence-based scoring

plugins.name: code-simplifier
plugins.description: Agent that simplifies and refines code for clarity, consistency, and maintainability while preserving functionality

plugins.name: commit-commands
plugins.description: Streamline your git workflow with simple commands for committing, pushing, and creating pull requests

plugins.name: cwc-makers
plugins.description: Seamless onboarding for the Code-with-your AI assistant Makers Cardputer: one /maker-setup command clones the build-with-claude repo, flashes UIFlow firmware, and installs the your AI assistant Buddy app bundle onto a freshly-plugged-in M5Stack Cardputer-Adv.

plugins.name: explanatory-output-style
plugins.description: Adds educational insights about implementation choices and codebase patterns (mimics the deprecated Explanatory output style)

plugins.name: feature-dev
plugins.description: Comprehensive feature development workflow with specialized agents for codebase exploration, architecture design, and quality review

plugins.name: frontend-design
plugins.description: Frontend design skill for UI/UX implementation

plugins.name: hookify
plugins.description: Easily create hooks to prevent unwanted behaviors by analyzing conversation patterns

plugins.name: learning-output-style
plugins.description: Interactive learning mode that requests meaningful code contributions at decision points (mimics the unshipped Learning output style)

plugins.name: math-olympiad
plugins.description: Solve competition math (IMO, Putnam, USAMO) with adversarial verification that catches what self-verification misses. Fresh-context verifiers attack proofs with specific failure patterns. Calibrated abstention over bluffing.

plugins.name: mcp-server-dev
plugins.description: Skills for designing and building MCP servers that work seamlessly with your AI assistant — guides you through deployment models (remote HTTP, MCPB, local), tool design patterns, auth, and interactive MCP apps.

plugins.name: playground
plugins.description: Creates interactive HTML playgrounds — self-contained single-file explorers with visual controls, live preview, and prompt output with copy button

plugins.name: plugin-dev
plugins.description: Plugin development toolkit with skills for creating agents, commands, hooks, MCP integrations, and comprehensive plugin structure guidance

plugins.name: pr-review-toolkit
plugins.description: Comprehensive PR review agents specializing in comments, tests, error handling, type design, code quality, and code simplification

plugins.name: ralph-loop
plugins.description: Continuous self-referential AI loops for interactive iterative development, implementing the Ralph Wiggum technique. Run your AI assistant in a while-true loop with the same prompt until task completion.

plugins.name: security-guidance
plugins.description: Security reminder hook that warns about potential security issues when editing files, including command injection, XSS, and unsafe code patterns

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: Create new skills, improve existing skills, and measure skill performance. Use when users want to create a skill from scratch, update or optimize an existing skill, run evals to test a skill, or benchmark skill performance with variance analysis.

plugins.name: atlassian-rovo
plugins.description: Manage Jira and Confluence fast

plugins.name: box
plugins.description: Search and reference your documents

plugins.name: build-ios-apps
plugins.description: Build iOS apps with workflows for App Intents, SwiftUI UI work, refactors, performance profiling, leak investigation, and simulator debugging.

plugins.name: build-macos-apps
plugins.description: Build, run, test, debug, instrument, and implement local macOS apps using Xcode, SwiftUI, AppKit interop, unified logging, and shell-first desktop workflows.

plugins.name: build-web-apps
plugins.description: Build web apps with frontend asset design, browser testing, UI components, payments, and database guidance.

plugins.name: canva
plugins.description: Search, create, edit designs

plugins.name: circleci
plugins.description: Build, test, and deploy any application

plugins.name: cloudflare

plugins.name: coderabbit

plugins.name: security

plugins.name: expo
plugins.description: Official Expo skills for building, deploying, upgrading, and debugging Expo and React Native apps.

plugins.name: figma
plugins.description: Figma workflows for design implementation, Code Connect templates, and design system rule generation.

plugins.name: game-studio
plugins.description: Design, prototype, and ship browser games with guided 2D and 3D workflows, asset pipelines, and playtesting support.

plugins.description: Inspect repositories, triage pull requests and issues, debug CI, and publish changes through a hybrid GitHub connector and CLI workflow.

plugins.name: google-drive
plugins.description: Use Google Drive as the single entrypoint for Drive, Docs, Sheets, and Slides work.

plugins.name: heygen
plugins.description: Create HeyGen avatar videos and personalized video messages. Build a persistent digital identity from a photo, then generate presenter-led videos with your digital twin.

plugins.name: hubspot
plugins.description: Work with your HubSpot data to analyze patterns, create and update records, and manage your CRM operations.

plugins.name: hugging-face
plugins.description: Inspect models, datasets, Spaces, and research

plugins.name: hyperframes
plugins.description: Write HTML, render video. Compositions, GSAP animations, captions, voiceovers, audio-reactive visuals, and website-to-video capture for HyperFrames.

plugins.name: life-science-research
plugins.description: General life-sciences research workflows with query routing, evidence synthesis, and optional parallel subagent analysis across genetics, omics, biology, chemistry, structure, clinical evidence, and public dataset discovery.

plugins.name: linear
plugins.description: Find and reference issues and projects.

plugins.name: neon-postgres
plugins.description: Manage Neon Serverless Postgres projects and databases with the neon-postgres agent skill and the Neon MCP Server

plugins.description: Deploy projects and manage preview or production releases on Netlify.

plugins.name: notion
plugins.description: Notion workflows for implementation planning, research synthesis, meeting preparation, and knowledge capture.

plugins.name: developers
plugins.description: Build with OpenAI APIs, Agents SDK, and ChatGPT Apps, and create and save OpenAI API keys from your AI assistant.

plugins.description: Connect Outlook Calendar for scheduling, daily briefs, event prep, and safe meeting changes.

plugins.name: outlook-email
plugins.description: Work with Outlook Email using the configured Microsoft Outlook app connector.

plugins.name: plugin-eval
plugins.description: Evaluate your AI assistant skills and plugins from chat with a beginner-friendly start command, local-first reports, token budget explanations, and guided benchmarking.

plugins.name: remotion
plugins.description: Remotion video creation skills — best practices, animations, audio, captions, 3D, and more for building programmatic videos with React.

plugins.name: render
plugins.description: Skills for deploying, debugging, monitoring, and migrating apps on Render.

plugins.name: sentry
plugins.description: Inspect recent issues and events in Sentry from your AI assistant.

plugins.description: Work with SharePoint using the configured Microsoft SharePoint app connector.

plugins.name: slack
plugins.description: Work with Slack using the configured Slack integration.

plugins.description: Payments and business tools

plugins.name: supabase
plugins.description: Access your Supabase projects and perform tasks like managing tables, fetching config, and querying data.

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works: planning, TDD, debugging, and collaboration workflows.

plugins.name: teams
plugins.description: Work with Teams using the configured Microsoft Teams app connector.

plugins.name: temporal
plugins.description: Comprehensive skill for the entire Temporal lifecycle — developing applications, using the Temporal CLI, running and managing Temporal Server, and working with Temporal Cloud.

plugins.name: test-android-apps
plugins.description: Test Android apps with emulator workflows for reproduction, screenshots, UI inspection, log capture, and performance profiling.

plugins.name: twilio-developer-kit
plugins.description: Twilio Skills provide procedural knowledge for AI coding agents — which APIs to use, in what order, and what to avoid. Covers Messaging, Voice, Verify, SendGrid, and 30+ products.

plugins.name: vercel
plugins.description: Build and deploy web apps and agents

plugins.name: zoom
plugins.description: Connect your AI assistant to Zoom meeting context and build Zoom apps, bots, API integrations, SDK workflows, webhooks, and automations.

plugins.name: zotero
plugins.description: Work with Zotero from your AI assistant: search your library, export BibTeX, insert citations, and import references through the Zotero desktop app.

plugins.name: agent-compatibility
plugins.description: CLI-backed repo compatibility scans plus your AI assistant agents that audit startup, validation, and docs against reality.

plugins.name: cli-for-agent
plugins.description: Patterns for designing CLIs that coding agents can run reliably: non-interactive flags, layered help with examples, pipelines, actionable errors, idempotency, and dry-run.

plugins.name: continual-learning
plugins.description: Incrementally learns durable user preferences and workspace facts from transcript changes and keeps AGENTS.md up to date with plain bullet points.

plugins.name: create-plugin
plugins.description: Scaffold and validate new your AI assistant plugins. Handles directory setup, manifest generation, and pre-submission quality checks for the marketplace.

plugins.name: sdk
plugins.description: Build apps, scripts, CI pipelines, and automations on top of the your AI assistant TypeScript SDK (@cursor/sdk) — runtime selection, auth, streaming, MCP, error handling, and ready-to-extend integration patterns.

plugins.name: team-kit
plugins.description: Internal workflows used by your AI assistant developers for CI, code review, shipping, control-cli, control-ui, verify-this, test reliability, code cleanup, and work summaries. Designed to work without requiring third-party service integrations.

plugins.name: docs-canvas
plugins.description: Render documentation — architecture notes, API references, runbooks, and codebase walkthroughs — as a navigable your AI assistant Canvas with sections, table of contents, diagrams, and cross-references.

plugins.name: orchestrate
plugins.description: Fan a large task out across parallel your AI assistant cloud agents via the your AI assistant SDK: planners publish tasks, workers hand off back up, and a script reconciles the tree from disk and git.

plugins.name: pr-review-canvas
plugins.description: Render PR diffs as interactive your AI assistant Canvases organized for reviewer comprehension — groups changes by importance, separates boilerplate from core logic, and highlights tricky or unexpected code.

plugins.name: teaching
plugins.description: Skill mapping, practice plans, and learning retrospectives. Builds personalized roadmaps with milestones and practice checkpoints, and runs periodic reviews to adjust based on progress.
